subject.description: What to investigate. Free-form — ticket ID, alert URL, bug description, service name, claim from a prior step.

context.description: Optional additional prose hints from the orchestrator or user.

repoCwd.description: Absolute repo path for code-reading. Omit to stay external-only.

expect.description: Shape hint: 'incident' triggers the verdict block; 'claim' returns supporting/refuting evidence; 'general' returns findings + evidence only.
